summary: Stunning soundboard mix of a legendary first set, captured with crystal‑clear fidelity.
review: All three reviewers rave about the pristine sound quality and beautiful mix of this soundboard recording, calling it “perfect” and “beautiful”. The performance itself is described as a top‑tier first set with the band fully on fire despite a few tuning delays, making it a must‑listen for fans of this era.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently 5‑star reviews praise both the musical performance and the flawless soundboard recording, indicating an exceptional show with excellent technical quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers highlight a beautiful mix, crystal‑clear clarity and describe it as “as perfect a recording as possible”; no issues noted.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The first set is celebrated as top‑tier, with the band fully energized and tight even through occasional tuning delays; overall flow is praised as high‑energy and memorable.
